content.en:
"Elder Taishang, what should we do now, although the strength of a highness of the supreme hall of the human race cannot compete with our Yun family, we can't kill a highness!"

A galaxy-level elder of the Yun family transmitted his divine sense.

Drifting Rain Allah frowned, but immediately transmitted: "If you don't kill His Highness the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, as for the others, even if they are killed, the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race will not be able to sanction us." After all, now they are invading our Yun family's hole cards, and they are taking the initiative to provoke our Yun family. "

"Yes!"

Everyone in the Yun family responded.

Distance.

Grand Elder Yun Zhen looked at Allah's side of the Floating Rain and said weakly, "Elder Taishang, save me!"

Rumble!!!!

Drifting rain Allah stepped out, and the powerful momentum belonging to the galaxy level on his body pressed away, trying to shock Ye Tian.

Yun Chen and Yun Xi's faces changed, if it weren't for the aura of Allah Jinchen protecting them, otherwise they would probably not even be able to stand firmly.

"Your Highness Wanfa, what do you mean by this, why did you arrest my Yun family's Great Elder?"

Allah questioned the rain.

"Bold, dare to talk to our Highness like this!"

Jin Chen Allah shouted.

"Stand down!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

Jin Chen Allah bent down and retreated, with his strength, he couldn't help Ye Tian, he could only be responsible for watching the Great Elder Yun Zhen.

He roared at Allah in the rain, just to protect Ye Tian, but in terms of true strength, he was not the opponent of Allah in the rain.

Of course, he was not worried about Ye Tian's safety, after all, Ye Tian also had a dark lord and ten cosmic gods, with the power of the master, even if he was separated by many river systems, he could easily protect Ye Tian.

That's why he retreated with confidence.

"Raining Allah, the Sha Luo Yun family is my friend, you want to destroy the Sha Luo Yun family, is there anything wrong with me interfering? Moreover, I have killed a lot of Tianjiao of the Panyun Xingyun family, making the Yun family suffer heavy losses, doesn't the Yun family want to deal with me?" Ye Tian said deliberately.

Allah clenched his fists, he couldn't wait to kill Ye Tian immediately, but in this way, the Panyun Xingyun family might no longer exist.

The Panyun Xingyun family has no background in the supreme hall of the human race, so they dare not mess around.

"What did His Highness Wanfa say, you are His Highness the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, how can our Yun family deal with you! But the Shaluo Yun family is a branch of our Yun family, and we belong to the internal strife, is it possible that His Highness Wanfa still cares about the internal strife?"

Allah asked.

"I can really manage the internal strife of the major forces!" Ye Tian smiled and casually took out his Town Domain Envoy Token.

Although he didn't care about the identity of the envoy of the town domain, for the major forces of the disk domain, this token was even easier than his identity.

After all, a force like the Yun family is short-sighted and doesn't know Ye Tian's strong identity at all, but they know the town envoy token.

When Ye Tian showed out the town domain messenger token, Allah was stunned.

"Town Emissary Token, you...... How can there be a town envoy token, could it be that you are a town envoy, impossible! The previous town envoy cultivation was the lowest galaxy level, and most of them were galaxy level. You're only at the god level, how can you be a town envoy?"

Allah took a step back in fright.

Envoy of the Town Domain, this identity is enough to surpass all the galaxy levels in the Domain, second only to the Cosmic God.

He is just the head of a pseudo-nine-star force, even a nine-star force like the Sword Emperor Sect would not dare to offend a town envoy, because the town envoy can mobilize the power of the four overlord-level forces, and even the head of the four overlord-level forces will give face to the town envoy.

"I've seen the envoy of the town!"

Allah said respectfully in the rain.

Ye Tian saw that Allah of Drifting Rain confessed, and couldn't help but smile and said, "Drifting Rain Allah, from today onwards, the Panyun Xingyun family must not deal with the Sharoyun family, what do you think?"

He wants Allah to express his word, and if Allah is not interested in it, he does not mind erasing Allah of rain.

After all, he didn't want to waste too much time here.

Allah hesitated, he naturally didn't want to let go of the Sha Luoyun family, but he never wanted to offend a town envoy!

The current Yun family can't afford to offend a town envoy, otherwise the Yun family's life will be very difficult in the future.

Just as he was about to give up, a voice came.

"Drifting rain Allah, there is no need for the Yun family to be afraid of a highness, the Sword Emperor Sect is willing to support you!"

Wow!

A sword light tore through the void and turned into a figure.

Seeing this person, many Yun family powerhouses said respectfully: "I've seen the Black Shadow Sword Master!"

This person is the Black Shadow Sword Master, and he is also the former Black Shadow Sword Lord.

Nowadays, the Black Ghost Sword Lord is already a galaxy-level powerhouse, and his strength is much stronger than Rainfall Allah, after all, the Black Ghost Sword Lord was considered a top group of powerhouses at the galaxy-level level.

"Black Phantom Sword Master, you're here!"

Allah of Drifting Rain said with a smile when he saw the Black Ghost Sword Lord.

"Drifting rain Allah, don't worry, since your Yun family has defected to our Sword Emperor Sect, our Sword Emperor Sect is willing to be your master! What about the town domain envoys, although they have great power, as long as the major forces do not violate the rules and do not betray the human race, the town region envoys cannot destroy the forces above eight stars!" The Black Ghost Sword Lord said coldly.

Allah Drifting Rain was a little worried, and the voice asked: "Black Ghost Sword Lord, Ye Tiannai is His Royal Highness of Ten Thousand Laws in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and now he doesn't know how to become a town envoy, in case he mobilizes the strong of the four hegemon-level forces, our Yun family can't even carry the Sword Emperor Sect, right?"

The Black Ghost Sword Lord laughed: "Raining Allah, the Panyu is now not the four hegemon-level forces, but the five hegemon-level forces!"

"Is it ......?"

Allah's pupils shrank, and he immediately thought of a possibility, and immediately said with joy: "Could it be that the one from the Sword Emperor Sect has stepped into the realm of the cosmic gods?"

"That's right, the old sect master took advantage of the opportunity of transforming the immortal clan to improve his cultivation talent in one fell swoop, and now he has become a cosmic god, and our Sword Emperor Sect has officially stepped into the overlord-level power level. In the past, except for the lack of a cosmic god, our Sword Emperor Sect was not weaker than the overlord-level forces in other aspects, so what is there to fear now?"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord said proudly.

"Congratulations!"

Allah congratulated the rain.

The two chatted, seemingly forgetting Ye Tian's existence.

"Black Shadow Sword Master, do you want to stand up for the Yun family?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"That's good!" The Black Shadow Sword Lord looked directly at Ye Tian, "Your Highness Wanfa, you dared to threaten me at the beginning, although you have become Your Highness the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, I don't dare to do anything to you." However, what about His Highness in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, there are many children of the universe born in the domain, but there are only a few strong people who can become the gods of the universe in the end. Although I don't know how you got the town emissary, the town emissary can only serve for a thousand years, and once a thousand years are over, you are just a child of the universe. Compared to our Sword Emperor Sect, you are nothing!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord thought that the Sword Emperor Sect had become a hegemon-level force, and he suddenly swelled, and he didn't understand what the meaning of the town envoy and the galaxy-level guardian representative was.

Ye Tian was not an ordinary highness at all, let alone the Sword Emperor Sect, even the entire territory was nothing in Ye Tian's eyes.

"Jin Chen Zhenjun, kill Great Elder Yun Zhen, I'm ...... Don't want to waste any more time!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Jin Chen Allah nodded.

Burst!

With a single shot, Yun Zhen's head was directly annihilated.

At this point, Yun Zhen, a galaxy-level powerhouse, fell under the spear of Jin Chen Zhenjun.

Then.

Drifting Rain Allah and the Black Ghost Sword Lord were dumbfounded, and even Yun Chen and Yun Xi were dumbfounded.

Yunchen thought that Ye Tian would compromise a little, after all, now it involves overlord-level forces!

The Sword Emperor Sect gave birth to the Universe God, what a big deal, and a Universe God has an almost eternal lifespan, as long as the Universe God is not killed, the Sword Emperor Sect will always be a hegemon-level force.

The gap between the Nine Star Forces and the Overlord-level forces is too big, and there are many Highnesses born in the Disk Domain, and from generation to generation, there are only a handful of Highnesses who have survived in the end.

Therefore, Yunchen also felt that Ye Tian's status was far inferior to that of a cosmic god, let alone strength.

But now, Ye Tian actually ignored the Sword Emperor Sect and directly killed Yun Zhen.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you will be affected by this!"

Yunchen was grateful but worried.

Ye Tian smiled slightly: "Old Yun, I said that it's just a Yun family, it's nothing." Not to mention the Yun family, even if the Sword Emperor Sect is still nothing in my eyes, even if it is the cosmic god of the Sword Emperor Sect, it can't change today's result!"

As soon as these words came out, the Black Shadow Sword Lord was furious.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you are too arrogant, you dare to be rude to the God of the Universe!"

The Black Phantom Sword Lord roared.

Immediately.

The Black Shadow Sword Lord made a move, he didn't dare to kill Ye Tian, but the others around Ye Tian, he dared to kill.

He wants to make Ye Tian regret it!

"Nine Heavens Sword Technique!"

One after another, sword light tore through the starry sky and stabbed towards Ye Tian's side, enveloping everyone except Ye Tian.

A galaxy-level powerhouse's unsurpassed sword move, each sword light is enough to kill a galaxy-level ninth-order powerhouse.

Yun Chen and Yun Xi panicked, and even looked desperate, while Ye Tian and Monarch Jin Chen were very calm.

Just as the sword light was about to arrive, a finger appeared, annihilating all the sword light at once.

Then, this finger seemed to run through the galaxy, enveloping the entire starry sky, and crushed towards the Black Shadow Sword Lord.

The void is blocked, and everything is still!

The Black Shadow Sword Lord tried to manipulate the law of the sword between heaven and earth and cast powerful moves, but under this finger, the law of the sword collapsed.

A finger falls!

Burst!

The Black Shadow Sword Master spat blood from his mouth, and the sword weapon in his hand was completely turned into countless fragments, and even a blood hole was pierced through his body, which was difficult to heal.

"Cosmic God!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord was terrified.

He didn't know which cosmic god made the move, but he was far inferior to a cosmic god, not even one in ten thousand.

"Help!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord immediately crushed the jade pendant for help.

This is a distress token that every high-level member of the Sword Emperor Sect has, as long as the distance is not very far, the cosmic god of the Sword Emperor Sect can descend from the sky to project.

As soon as the jade pendant was shattered, the laws of heaven and earth and energy automation made a figure.

This figure is a middle-aged man, with a pair of sword eyebrows, and incomparably deep pupils, like a bottomless ancient well.

At this time, the laws of the sword surrounded him, like a supreme god.

The cosmic god of the Sword Emperor Sect, the Sword Feather Divine Lord, has arrived!
